NAME: gnomAD v2.1 — Exome + Genome expansion
DESCRIPTION: Rebranded to Genome Aggregation Database (gnomAD) with broadened scope. gnomAD v2.1 released 125,748 exomes and 15,708 genomes — a massive expansion over ExAC. Introduced population-specific allele frequency data across multiple ancestral groups and provided the most comprehensive catalog of human genetic variation to date.
